backend/main.mo: Main backend actor defining data types (Journey, LocationInfo, UserProfile, CityRating, CityAlbum, TravelSpot, MusicAlbum, WebsiteLayoutSettings, ScheduleItem, MapBookmark, VibeItem, GeonameCity) and state variables using OrderedMaps for storing application data with blob storage and access control integration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two requirements: REQ-1 to modify WebsiteLayoutPanel to show UTC offset inline with date, and REQ-2 to add local time display with UTC offset in LocationMapExplorer above the 'Select UTC Offset' button.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including App.tsx, pages, components, hooks, and utilities, describing their functionality and recent changes related to map features, journey management, media handling, and UI components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads the React application and includes the SunCalc library for sun position calculations.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that sets up QueryClient, ThemeProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, renders LocationMapExplorer, and includes BackendDebugger for global backend actor access.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin control panel component managing journeys with calendar-based date range selection, schedule items, travel spots, music albums, geoname data, and timezone settings with collapsible sections and CRUD operations.
Development utility component that exposes the backend actor to window.backend for console debugging, displays principal information, role verification commands, and temporary admin promotion functionality with security warnings.
frontend/src/components/CityAlbumManager: City album manager component with file upload (images/videos), social media link management with real-time URL validation, authentication checks, and comprehensive media gallery functionality for organizing city-specific content.
frontend/src/components/CityloguePanel.t: Component file appears to be empty or truncated in the provided content.
frontend/src/components/GeonameGeographi: React component for managing geographical city data from Geoname files, providing upload, search, pagination, CRUD operations, and classification of cities by feature codes (capital, global, major, regional, etc.).
frontend/src/components/HeartRating.tsx: React component that renders a 10-heart rating system with partial fill support, hover effects, and click-to-rate functionality with 0.1 precision increments.
frontend/src/components/InteractiveGlobe: Complex 3D globe component using Three.js that displays countries, cities, borders, time zones, solar terminator/twilight, flight animations, and interactive markers with object pooling for performance.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/Doodle: Renders a scrapbook-style itinerary view with polaroid-styled schedule items, day headers, and decorative elements. Displays journey schedule grouped by days with time and location details.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/RetroI: React component that renders a vintage postcard-styled itinerary dialog with retro design elements (stamps, postmarks, ribbons) displaying journey schedule grouped by days.
frontend/src/components/LocationInfoDial: Dialog component for adding, updating, or deleting location photos with file upload validation, preview, and blob storage integration for travel locations.
frontend/src/components/LoginPanel.tsx: Authentication panel component using Internet Identity for login/logout with status display, principal ID truncation, and query cache management.
frontend/src/components/MapComponent.tsx: Leaflet-based map component displaying travel spots, bookmarks, and schedule items with custom icons, popups, media galleries, route visualization, and city filtering capabilities.
frontend/src/components/MediaGalleryPopu: Displays a tabbed media gallery popup with support for photos, videos, and embedded social media content (YouTube, Instagram). Includes navigation controls, fullscreen viewing, and utilities for extracting video IDs and creating embed URLs.
frontend/src/components/MusicAlbumManage: Admin component for managing music albums and songs with CRUD operations, file uploads, search/filter functionality, and integration with backend queries. Handles album creation, song uploads, and displays album/song metadata.
frontend/src/components/MusicPanel.tsx: Dialog component that displays a browsable music collection organized by albums and songs. Allows users to select songs for playback and shows currently playing track status.
frontend/src/components/MusicPlayerBar.t: Persistent music player bar with playback controls (play/pause, skip, volume), progress tracking, and auto-play support. Manages audio playback state and integrates with music albums from backend.
frontend/src/components/TimezoneManageme: Admin component for uploading and managing timezone GeoJSON data with validation, IndexedDB caching, and manual execution workflow. Provides step-by-step verification of data persistence to backend canister.
Displays journeys with expandable itineraries, schedule management, and filtering by live/upcoming/past status. Supports flight animations, 2D map views, and both doodle and retro itinerary dialog views.
frontend/src/components/TravelSpotManage: Manages travel spots with CRUD operations, file uploads, social media links, and heart ratings. Includes city filtering, type categorization, and media preview functionality.
frontend/src/components/VibesPanel.tsx: Shows bookmarks and travel spots grouped by city with collapsible sections, type-based icons, and focus callbacks. Enhances vibe items with spot type information for proper categorization.
frontend/src/components/WebsiteLayoutPan: Manages website layout preferences including default search location and timezone display. Geocodes locations, calculates UTC offsets, and shows local/UTC time with timezone-aware formatting.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance with authentication, creating actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for data fetching and mutations including location geocoding, social media URL validation, and country name normalization utilities.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, including color schemes for UI components, music player styling, and heading color rules for different background modes.
frontend/src/lib/solarCalculations.ts: Calculates solar declination angle for a given day of year using Earth's axial tilt formula. Includes test cases for equinoxes and solstices.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneOffsetUtils.ts: Provides utilities to find timezone IDs matching a given UTC offset with quarter-hour precision, using Intl API for DST-aware calculations.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneUtils.ts: Handles timezone boundary detection and local time calculations with IndexedDB caching and backend fallback for timezone GeoJSON data.
frontend/src/lib/TzOverlayV2.ts: Timezone boundary rendering library for 3D globe visualization using Three.js, handling coordinate conversion, polygon unwrapping, quarter-hour offset precision, and timezone group management.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/LocationMapExplorer.t: Main page component for location exploration with 2D/3D map views, search functionality, travel spots, bookmarks, music player, and timezone visualization features.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleDayStyling.ts: Provides color palette and labeling utilities for schedule days (D1, D2, etc.), computing day indices from timestamps and formatting day context strings.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleRouteUtils.ts: Groups and sorts schedule items by calendar day and time, building chronological route coordinates for multi-day itineraries.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for extracting and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, custom animations for accordions, border radius utilities, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a 3D globe application tracking two feature requests to modify UTC timezone display formats in WebsiteLayoutPanel and LocationMapExplorer components, showing local time with inline UTC offset notation.
